overview: India Road Accident Data Analysis is an interactive data visualization dashboard showing 10 years of road accident statistics (2016–2025) across Indian states. It features filterable bar charts, pie charts, and trend lines broken down by state and vehicle type, plus an actionable prevention guidelines section.
features: Filter by state, vehicle type, and year range
Bar, pie, and line chart visualizations
Vehicle type breakdown (Two-wheelers, Cars, Heavy Vehicles)
Responsive layout for all screen sizes
Accessible charts with color-blind friendly palette
